description: Composition Pink round neck top made of 100% cotton, with pleated cap sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash Care Machine wash or hand wash separately in mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring dry Dry in shade Medium iron, but do not iron on print Don the boho chic look in a really cool way with this trendy pink top from jealous 21. The graphic print of roses on the front adds to it a fashionable edge, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims and heeled sandals for maximum style. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5’9”; Chest: 33”; Shoulders: 15.5”
